{{Infobox character
| name = Yan Shoumei
| aliases = Shoumei
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Blood Shadow]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Striker techniques]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, Red Crystal technique, Midnight Rain technique}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Redmoon Truegold}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, leader of the Redmoon Hall team, chosen of Reigan Shen}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Uncrowned]], Uncrowned of Redmoon Hall, competitor in the Uncrowned, Uncrowned in Calan Archer's faction}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, Overlady of Sailfin Port}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Redmoon Hall]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Dreadgod cultist]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Akura clan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|fighter}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|a dock}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Yan Shoumei Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Yan Shoumei, also known as Shoumei, is a [[Redmoon]] [[Truegold]] from [[Redmoon Hall]] and the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]]. She possesses a distinctive appearance characterized by long black hair that often [[veil{{!}}veils]] her face and wide, pale eyes. As a [[sacred artist]], she utilizes a specialized [[Blood Shadow]] that functions as an [[extension]] of her abilities, acting much like a cloak or a weapon. This [[Shadow]] is noted for being particularly powerful, potentially making her as formidable as two [[sacred artists]] of her rank. Her combat style involves a collection of [[blood]]-based techniques designed to synergize with her [[Shadow]], including a [[technique]] called [[Crusher]] that creates a protective diamond of [[Red madra{{!}}red madra]]. Shoumei's history is marked by significant hardship; she was abandoned as an infant and raised by various families after being found by fishermen. She has faced intense personal struggle against a petty tyrant named [[Anagi]], who oppressed her town and family. In combat, she has demonstrated intense emotions, including rage and hatred, and has been seen sustaining severe injuries in battle. She has served as a leader for her team and has participated in high-stakes matches, including a confrontation against [[Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] wears deep red [[sacred artist's robe{{!}}sacred artist's robes]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a woman with hair like a [[veil]] and uses [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Redmoon]] [[Truegold]] in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the leader of the [[Redmoon Hall]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yan Shoumei]] is of [[Redmoon Hall]] and a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">32</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a character that [[Eithan]] could potentially defeat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a ghostly girl that [[Lindon]] faced in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[spirit]] was growing disordered.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] suffered grievous wounds during her match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was looking for information on [[Yan Shoumei]] in the records.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a competitor in the [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was a [[disciple]] of the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a fighter in the [[tournament]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a member of [[Redmoon Hall]] with black hair and one visible eye.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] wears [[sacred arts]] robes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a character who interacts with [[Yerin]] and [[Calan Archer{{!}}Calan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Dreadgod cultist]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is an [[Uncrowned]] in [[Calan Archer]]'s faction.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is mentioned in relation to a master.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a fighter [[Yerin]] must face.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei{{!}}Shoumei]] is a character who [[Forged]] a [[Red Crystal]] for protection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei{{!}}Shoumei]]'s [[technique]] involves a collection of [[blood]] techniques intended to synergize with a [[Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the full name of [[Yan Shoumei{{!}}Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses the [[Ancient Scale]], a [[Divine Treasure]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses an [[Archlord weapon]] in her [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Redmoon artist]] who uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was gathering [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] competed against [[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] gathered [[blood madra]] in her palms.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the [[Uncrowned]] of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was part of the group under the [[Sage of Red Faith]] that ambushed [[Mercy]] and [[Akura Pride{{!}}Pride]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] provides a sense of more-than-physical strength.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an enhanced [[Shadow]] named [[Crusher]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">21</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] is developing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was abandoned on a dock as a baby.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was raised by six fishermen.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses the [[Red Crystal]] [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an [[Iron body]] and an [[Ancient Scale]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was trained by the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Redmoon artist]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] can unleash her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is an [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the [[Overlady]] of [[Sailfin Port]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses a [[Silverscale Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses an [[Ancient Scale]] received from [[Seshethkunaaz]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses the weapon [[Midnight Rain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses a bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses the [[Midnight Rain]] [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was an [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] summons [[Midnight Rain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“But you are,” she said, gathering her Blood Shadow around her and dashing forward.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Yan Shoumei of Redmoon Hall,” the man said, “why have you called my name?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
